overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars game showing a female character with a lightsaber exploring a desert canyon environment accompanied by a small creature. The character walks through rocky terrain with red sandstone formations, turns around, and continues exploring while the camera follows smoothly from behind.

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily through a desert canyon with towering red rock walls on both sides, heading toward a prominent rock spire in the distance. A small creature follows closely behind as the camera maintains a smooth third-person follow perspective.

segments.scene_description: The character stops and turns around to face the camera, briefly walking back toward the viewer before turning again to resume the forward direction. The canyon walls swap sides in the frame as the character reverses orientation, revealing the open canyon behind.

segments.scene_description: Continuing forward through the canyon, the character approaches the central rock formation with the creature companion still following. merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a red sandstone canyon as a character and their companion navigate toward a distant landmark. It begins with the character walking steadily between towering rock walls, heading directly toward a prominent spire in the distance. As the character stops and turns to face the camera, the perspective shifts to reveal the open expanse of the canyon behind them before they pivot once more to resume their forward path. The scene then progresses as the character approaches the central rock formation, with the environment narrowing around the spire. Finally, the movement concludes as a tactical guide UI element appears in the corner, highlighting a scannable point of interest in the terrain.
